calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Continued To Nov-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Vilma Deguzman,
Plaintiff's Witness Vilma Deguzman was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Maria Ines Guatemala dba Costa Del Sol.
Exhibit 1 - Lease dtd 05-16-01-------------------------- ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three Day Notice --------------------------- ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Judgment for Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 4423 Mission St., San Francisco, CA.
Lease is forfeited.
No money damages requested at the hearing, but Plaintiff may amend the Judgment for money damages after eviction was commenced.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

Ntc Of And Mtn To Set Matter For Trial
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Feb-02-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
